rag_rules: Use AGREE assumptions and guarantees that refer to component ports in valid component type scopes.
generic_rules: Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees inside annex agree only when the case supplies concrete bounds, named constants, or a visible relation.
Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {**... **};` blocks.
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references that are absent from the analyzed model and its configured dependencies.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope.
